svg.title: Sheet Music for "Rye Straw (D)"

text.tspan: A/D A/D A/D E/A | A D A · G/D | D G D A
A/D A/D A/D E/A | A D A/D E/A | D G A D [A A/D]
Source: Todd Phillips + Darol Anger, In the Pines (1995) [with many modifications]
Notes: Rye Straw seems to have a zillion variations. The core of this version draws from Darol
Anger's arrangement, where he seems to mash the 16 bars of one of its usual B-parts to create a
'bridge' C-part of 10 bars. It's pretty neat!
